{{Infobox character
| name = Rudeus Maxwell
| aliases = Maxwell
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gladstone Kidnapper]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|, insane revolutionary}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|leader}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

''See also: [[Rudeus Maxwell Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Rudeus Maxwell, also known as the [[Gladstone Kidnapper]], was a former member of the [[Imperial army]] who served for nearly a decade before retiring to claim his family's wealth. Though he appeared to be a high-ranking leader during his military service, he was described as a malcontent with revolutionary sympathies. He is primarily known for a six-year criminal career in which he abducted approximately fifty children from Gladstone Park and the surrounding areas. Maxwell operated out of a safe house located beneath his family's long-held residence near [[Gladstone Imperial Park]]. During his time as a kidnapper, he functioned as a mentor to his adopted brood, training them to be highly disciplined killers. He utilized the children's status as innocent street urchins as a cover for their missions. His training methods were noted for being exceptionally effective, producing individuals whose skills were comparable to the mythical [[Gardeners]]. Maxwell's life ended when one of his own trainees, [[Shera]], turned on him and killed him with a knife. Following his death, evidence found in his home led to his posthumous conviction for his crimes.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Once known as the [[Gladstone Kidnapper]], Rudeus Maxwell was a leader who dressed in black attire featuring a white rose in his pocket. He served as a mentor to [[Shera]], training her through hyper-alert conditioning and ambushing trainees in their sleep to ensure they never rested without a weapon. During her time cleaning the city under his guidance, he taught her to think like her targets and instilled the belief that mercy does not exist. Maxwell maintained strict discipline by punishing those he deemed unruly, yet he also instructed his students to rest whenever possible. His life ended when [[Shera]] killed him, leaving him to die in a pool of his own blood while he stood over [[Mari]]'s corpse with a smoking gun.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell is a leader who wears black pants and a black shirt with a white rose in his pocket.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell was killed in a pool of his own blood.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Rudeus Maxwell]] was previously known as the [[Gladstone Kidnapper]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell taught [[Shera]] never to sleep without a weapon.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell ambushes his trainees in their sleep.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell was a figure under whom [[Shera]] cleaned the city.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell would have told [[Shera]] she wasted precious seconds by leaving the man alive.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell used attacks that conditioned [[Shera]] to be hyper-alert.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell dresses the trainees for their missions.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell uses punishments on those he calls 'insubordinate' or 'unruly'.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell told [[Shera]] to think like them.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] killed Maxwell.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell taught the students to rest when they could.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell is a character who holds a smoking gun over [[Mari]]’s corpse.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell taught [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxwell told [[Shera]] that there is no such thing as mercy.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] wonders if Maxwell took something broken inside her.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|An insane revolutionary who enjoyed grilling pork chops, Rudeus Maxwell was a mentor who trained assassins such as [[Benji]] and instilled discipline into kidnapped children. He once took [[Shera]] in after her time spent begging and kidnapping, teaching her that home is where one is most vulnerable. Throughout his life, Maxwell provided [[Shera]] with advice and conducted ambushes against her, using a whistle to call his children-in-training. His teachings included instructions on when to kill, ideas regarding disguises, and various observations on scam artists and the insanity of family. Although [[Shera]] remembers his words, his killers have recently surfaced.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell has conducted ambushes against [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jorin's attacker and [[Shera]] trained under Maxwell.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell has ideas regarding disguises.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell once spoke regarding scam artists.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell is a person whose words [[Shera]] recalls.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell taught [[Shera]] that home is where you are most vulnerable.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Rudeus Maxwell]] is credited with instilling discipline into kidnapped children.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell once said that family is the root of all insanity.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell took [[Shera]] in after she had been kidnapping/begging.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell's killers have surfaced recently.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell is a person who once gave [[Shera]] advice.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell trained assassins including [[Benji]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell was an insane revolutionary who grilled pork chops.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell gave instructions on when to kill.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxwell used a whistle to call his children-in-training.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Maxwell trained imitation [[Gardeners]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Maxwell trained pseudo-[[Gardeners]] before they were stolen by the [[Magisters]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Maxwell taught [[Shera]] that one should never trust a mission that is too easy.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Maxwell's blood sprayed from [[Shera]]'s knife in a memory.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Think like them, and they can never outwit you. That was what Maxwell had told her, and it had certainly proved true on the night she killed him.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"They promise everything," Maxwell had said once, regarding scam artists.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"Home is the place where you're most vulnerable," Maxwell had once taught her.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“Kill when you have to. Kill when you’re in danger. Kill when the target has earned his fate. And kill when the target serves no useful function.”<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Never trust a mission that’s too easy,” Maxwell had taught her.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
